summary: Dynamic Boards Feature VERIFIED: Backend 24/24 tests passed. Frontend all UI elements working correctly: board selector dropdown uses dynamic boards from API, create board button (+ icon) shows for admin, delete board button (trash icon) shows only for non-system boards, create/delete flows work with confirmation dialogs.

feature_tested.name: Dynamic Boards CRUD
feature_tested.description: Admin should be able to create new boards and delete non-system boards. System boards (MASTER, COMPLETOS, PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE) cannot be deleted. When a board is deleted, its orders move to MASTER.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/config/boards: Returns dynamic boards list from DB (falls back to defaults if no DB config)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/config/boards: Creates new board - requires admin, rejects duplicates and empty names, converts to uppercase
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/config/boards/{name}: Deletes board - requires admin, rejects system boards, moves orders to MASTER

frontend_components.board-selector: Dropdown uses dynamic boards from API (activeBoards = dynamicBoards if loaded, else BOARDS constant)
frontend_components.create-board-btn: Plus icon button - shows for admin users only
frontend_components.new-board-input: Text input appears on click, Enter creates board, Escape cancels
frontend_components.delete-board-btn: Trash icon button - shows only for non-system boards when admin

issues: Console hydration warnings about span being child of tr/tbody/td - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

frontend_playwright.board_selector: PASS - data-testid='board-selector' found, dropdown shows dynamic boards
frontend_playwright.board_name_display: PASS - data-testid='board-name-display' shows current board name
frontend_playwright.board_creation: PASS - Enter key creates board, toast shows success message
frontend_playwright.board_dropdown_options: PASS - 23 boards in dropdown including system boards
frontend_playwright.delete_btn_hidden_master: PASS - Delete button hidden for MASTER
frontend_playwright.delete_btn_hidden_completos: PASS - Delete button hidden for COMPLETOS
frontend_playwright.delete_btn_hidden_papelera: PASS - Delete button hidden for PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE
frontend_playwright.escape_cancels_create: PASS - Escape key hides new board input

critical_code_review_comments: Dynamic boards feature implemented correctly with proper admin-only access control
System boards (MASTER, COMPLETOS, PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE) properly protected from deletion
Board names converted to uppercase for consistency
Orders are correctly moved to MASTER when their board is deleted
seed_data_creation: Created admin user session and regular user session for permission testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic boards feature complete and verified. Backend: GET/POST/DELETE /api/config/boards endpoints work correctly. Frontend: board selector uses dynamicBoards from useOrders hook, create/delete buttons show appropriately for admin users. System boards cannot be deleted. Board config stored in MongoDB 'board_config' collection with config_id='boards'. The 22 default boards include MASTER, SCHEDULING, BLANKS, SCREENS, NECK, EJEMPLOS, COMPLETOS, PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE, and MAQUINA1-14.
